subcodes.first_line: O thou kind Friend, I visited Philadelphia, for a few days, at the invitation of two ministers
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان چند روز بسبب دعوت دو کشیش و رجای احبای الهی بفلادلفیا رفتم دو
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
